instruction:
The linear function $y=-0.3x+39$ models the percentage of men in a certain city, $y$, smoking cigarettes $x$ years after 1995. Find the slope for the model. Then describe what this means in terms of the rate of change of male smokers in this city over time. a) $m=$ [ANS]
b) The percentage of men in this city who smoke has [ANS] (Enter: increased or decreased or not changed) at a rate of [ANS] \% per year after 1995.
